# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: CI/CD pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'
    
    - name: Cache dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci

    - name: Test
      run: npm test

    - name: Build
      run: npm run build

    - name: Artifact upload
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: application-build
        path: |
          path/to/your/build-folder

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Download build
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: application-build

    - name: Deploy to Production
      run: |
        rsync -avz ./ path/to/production/
        ssh user@host "cd path/to/production && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.js --env production"
      env:
        DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
